    ΓêÜ app-main has min-width guard and explicit background
    ΓêÜ app-content is a flex column with min-height 0 to allow nested scrolling (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ plugin viewport active state stretches and can shrink inside content area (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ intake tool active container uses flex + min-height 0 instead of fixed height
    ΓêÜ intake height chain includes plugin viewport containment and overflow guard (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ intake layout root has min-height 0 for nested flex scroll behavior (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ quote compare chat body uses responsive clamp and min-height 0 (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ quote compare message pane has min-height 0 + overflow-y auto (1 ms)
